Document:
# Core Rule 2 ## Respect each other.
- [color=red][bold]In and out of character discrimination based upon race, sexuality, and gender is strictly prohibited. If in-character actions are becoming out of character insults, it will be considered a rule break.[/bold][/color]
- [color=green][bold]In character discrimination based upon species, disabilities, injuries, and religion is allowed. Discrimination can be used to escalate into combat if used against you but shouldn't be the sole reason for combat.[/bold][/color]
- [color=yellow][bold]Speciesm is allowed, slurs regarding species cannot be parodies of real life slurs like "ligger". Speciest slurs can be used to escalate into combat if used against you but shouldn't be the sole reason for combat.[/bold][/color]
- [italics][color=green]If you believe a word will go too far, utilize admin help (F1) to ask for clarification. No response means you cannot say it.[/italics][/color]
